data.title: NEAR Protocol priced at $1.21 may test $1.28 barrier, aiming for $1.50 rally. Bulls face resistance.
data.description: The NEAR Protocol is currently priced at $1.21, while the Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 44.90, indicating a neutral stance. Technical analysis indicates that breaching the $1.28 resistance level could lead to a surge towards $1.50. However, bears are actively defending crucial levels amid this potential breakout.

data.title: Tom Lee Predicted Crypto Winter Will End By April—This Analyst Says 'April 2027 More Likely'
data.description: Cryptocurrency expert Willy Woo recently stated that the ongoing bear market could extend until April 2027, countering Wall Street strategist Tom Lee’s prediction of a recovery by April of the current year. Lee, who is also the chairman of BitMine Immersion Technologies Inc. (NYSE: BMNR), had mentioned in mid-February that the cryptocurrency winter might conclude by the latest in April. Lee believed that the market was at a critical point with a possible limited downside left. Although Lee had expressed optimism about a near end to the downturn, Woo disagreed, suggesting a more prolonged bear market period. Full information is detailed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Litecoin's price at $54.06 eyes $58 breakout amid bearish trend. RSI at 45.98, MACD signals caution. (Read More)
data.description: The Litecoin (LTC) cryptocurrency is currently trading at $54.06, with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 45.98. Technical analysis indicates a possible upswing towards the $58.17 resistance level. However, bearish signals from the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) indicator advise caution for the short-term trajectory.
